emails.subject: WIN $1000 NOW!!!

emails.subject: Cannot log into my account
emails.body: Hi support, I have been trying to log in for the past 2 hours and keep getting 'invalid credentials'. My account is manoj@company.com. Please help urgently.

emails.subject: Suggestion: Add dark mode
emails.body: Hello! Love the product. It would be great if you could add a dark mode option in the settings. Not urgent, just a nice-to-have.

emails.subject: Payment failed three times
emails.body: My card keeps getting declined when I try to upgrade my plan. I've tried two different cards and both fail at checkout. Please fix this ASAP.

emails.body: Enter your credit card to claim. Offer expires in 1 hour!!!

emails.subject: App crashes on iOS 17.4
emails.body: Your app crashes every time I open a document on iPhone 15 Pro with iOS 17.4. Reproducible 100% of the time. Crash log attached.

emails.subject: Increase my storage quota
emails.body: I need more than 5GB for my project archive. Can you upgrade me to the 50GB plan and bill monthly?

emails.subject: Nigerian Prince Needs Help
emails.body: URGENT: I am a prince from Nigeria and need to transfer $10M. Please send your bank details.

emails.subject: Invoice #4421 overdue notice
emails.body: This is a reminder that invoice #4421 for $2,400 is now 30 days overdue. Please settle to avoid service interruption.

emails.subject: Integration API broken
emails.body: Our Zapier integration stopped working at 3AM UTC. Webhooks return 503. This is blocking our entire sales pipeline. P1 issue.

emails.subject: Testimonial request
emails.body: Hi, we'd love to feature you in our case study. Can you share a short testimonial about how our product helped your team?

emails.subject: Refund for cancelled subscription
emails.body: I cancelled my annual plan last week but haven't received my prorated refund of $89. Can you process this?

emails.body: Earn $500/day from home! No experience needed. Click to start!

emails.subject: Data export tool not working
emails.body: The CSV export button on the analytics page downloads an empty file. Has been broken since yesterday's release. Need this for monthly report.

emails.subject: PRODUCTION DB CORRUPTED - ALL DATA LOST
emails.body: CRITICAL: Our production PostgreSQL database appears to be corrupted after your migration script ran at 02:00 UTC. We cannot access ANY customer records. Revenue impact: $50,000/hour. Need immediate escalation to your senior engineering team.

emails.body: Click now to claim your free iPhone 16! Hurry, only 10 left!

emails.subject: Security vulnerability report
emails.body: I discovered a SQL injection vulnerability in your /api/search endpoint. Have a PoC that dumps the users table. Please acknowledge and remediate. Will disclose in 7 days.

emails.subject: Feature: Bulk user import via CSV
emails.body: It would be great to import users in bulk using a CSV file. Our team has 200+ accounts to create.

emails.subject: Subscription renewal question
emails.body: When does my annual subscription renew? I want to make sure my payment method is up to date.

emails.subject: URGENT: OAuth SSO broken for all enterprise users
emails.body: As of 09:15 UTC, none of our 500 enterprise users can authenticate via SAML SSO. They are completely locked out. This must be fixed in the next 30 minutes or we escalate to our legal team.

emails.subject: Documentation typo
emails.body: Found a typo on your docs page - 'Auhtentication' should be 'Authentication' in the API reference.

emails.subject: Mobile app login loop
emails.body: After your latest Android update, the app is stuck in a login loop for users with 2FA enabled. Affects about 30% of our mobile users based on our analytics.

emails.subject: Partnership proposal
emails.body: We would love to explore a white-label partnership for the APAC market. Can you connect me with your BD team?

emails.subject: Data residency compliance issue - GDPR
emails.body: Our legal team flagged that your platform stores EU customer data on US servers without a valid DPA in place. GDPR Article 46 compliance required within 48 hours or we will have to suspend our account and notify authorities.

emails.subject: Billing discrepancy - charged twice
emails.body: I was charged $299 twice in March. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately.

emails.subject: Request for custom SLA agreement
emails.body: As we scale to 1M users, we need a custom 99.99% uptime SLA with dedicated support. Can your enterprise team reach out?

emails.subject: API Rate limit too restrictive
emails.body: Our data pipeline hits your 1000 req/min rate limit constantly. We need at least 10,000 req/min for production workloads. Can you adjust our account limits?

emails.subject: URGENT: Corporate Credential Revocation
emails.body: Dear Employee, Your corporate credentials have been flagged for unusual activity. Click here to verify your identity within 1 hour or your access will be permanently revoked: http://corporate-it-verify.security-update.com/login

emails.subject: Cloud infrastructure cost anomaly
emails.body: Our AWS bill for April is projected to be $145,000, which is 300% above budget. We need a breakdown of RDS and EC2 usage by tag immediately. This is a board-level concern.

emails.subject: Subpoena for User Data - Case #9921
emails.body: Please find attached a legal subpoena regarding user account 'j_doe_99'. We require all login logs and PII by Friday 5 PM UTC as per the court order.

emails.subject: New Emoji Suggestion
emails.body: Can you add a 'shrug' emoji to the comment section? It would be really helpful for our team comms.

emails.subject: App Store Review: 1 star - 'Waste of money'
emails.body: This app is terrible. It doesn't even open on my phone. I want a refund and I'm telling all my friends to avoid this.
